name: 4leafclover
description: 4leafclover - Bold high-contrast Ghost theme with horizontal feed, sidebar, and deep customization.

sticky_header.description: Keep the site header fixed to the top while scrolling

sidebar_sticky.description: Make the sidebar stick while scrolling (desktop)

social_links_extra.description: Comma-separated list of Platform:URL pairs (e.g. GitHub:https://github.com/x, LinkedIn:https://linkedin.com/in/x)

cta_text.description: Signup CTA text used in the sidebar

cta_subtext.default: No spam. Just the good stuff.
cta_subtext.description: Signup CTA subtext used in the sidebar

contact_webhook_url.title: Contact form webhook URL
contact_webhook_url.description: Optional. If set, the contact form will POST to this webhook (e.g., n8n). Leave blank to use the form action endpoint.

contact_success_message.default: Thanks — your message has been sent!
contact_success_message.title: Contact success message

contact_error_message.default: Sorry — something went wrong. Please try again later.
contact_error_message.title: Contact error message
contact_error_message.description: Message shown if the webhook returns an error.

home_hero_logo.title: Home hero overlay logo
home_hero_logo.description: Centered logo overlay on the home page publication cover image.

show_home_intro.description: Show the homepage intro content (from the page slug above)

page_bridge_text.title: Page bridge text
page_bridge_text.description: Text shown in the bridge between the hero and the page feed. Format: Left:Right (example: Field:Notes).

footer_bridge_text.title: Footer bridge text
footer_bridge_text.description: Text shown in the bridge above the footer. Format: Left:Right (example: Stay Curious:Stay Useful).
